keyPoints: Introduction: Vectors are the Building Blocks
Definition: A set of vectors that satisfies certain properties
Span: The Set of All Possible Combinations
Linear Independence: No Vector Can be Written as a Linear Combination of Others
Row Space: The Span of the Rows of a Matrix
Column Space: The Span of the Columns of a Matrix
Linear Dependence: A Vector Can be Written as a Linear Combination of Others
